_comment: All platform connections are set up via one-click OAuth. Run /cmo to connect.
_oauth_comment: Each `_oauthFoo` block is INJECTED BY THE BFF (Cloudflare Worker) and persisted to the vault on every OAuth exchange — not user-editable. The Cloudflare secret <FOO>_CLIENT_ID is the source of truth; if you set a value here it will be overwritten the next time you run /merlin and connect the platform. Hardcoded fallback values are baked into the binary so first-launch (before the BFF has responded) still works.
_redditPostMode_comment: How reddit-prospect-post behaves: "auto" runs the 7-layer compliance preflight (account age / karma / cadence / dedup / shadowban) and submits via /api/comment. "draft-only" skips the compliance gate and saves the reply to results/reddit_draft_<ts>.txt for manual paste — the safe default for fresh accounts, warm-up windows, and shadowban recovery.
productDescription: A short description of your brand.
